---
title: "\'Books Recommended\'  By Lady Frederick Bruce and Miss Yonge"
---

## \'Books Recommended\'  By Lady Frederick Bruce and Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1896
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 6.23 (July, 1896) 182-188

### Notes

Very short notices of a large number of books.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
